statement: In every magma, Equation 2840 (`x = ((y * z) * (w * w)) * u`) implies Equation 2549 (`x = (y * ((y * y) * z)) * w`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0555
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op (op y z) (op w w)) u)) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op y (op (op y y) z)) w)
